promptDef.name: search-signal-properties-used-in-template
promptDef.prompt: Find component signal properties that are used in template

summary.prompt: Find component signal properties that are used in template

input.cypher:
MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (cdi)-[:HAS_SYMBOL_IMPORT]->(imp:ImportDeclaration { moduleSpecifier: '@angular/core' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(st:TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
WHERE st.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal'] AND st.filePath CONTAINS '@angular/core'
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(st:TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
WHERE st.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
AND st.filePath CONTAINS '@angular/core'
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 20

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(st:TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration|ClassDeclaration)
WHERE st.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
AND st.filePath CONTAINS '@angular/core'
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 20

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
RETURN c.name as componentName, c.filePath
LIMIT 20

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 30

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(st:ClassDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE st.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath, st.name as signalType
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(st:ClassDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, st.name as typeName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
WITH c, p
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(typeDecl)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, typeDecl.name as typeName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(typeDecl:ClassDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, typeDecl.name as typeName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(typeDecl:ClassDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE typeDecl.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, typeDecl.name as typeName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(typeDecl)
WHERE typeDecl.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN p.name as propertyName, typeDecl.name as typeName, p.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION]->(typeDecl:ClassDeclaration|TypeAliasDeclaration|InterfaceDeclaration)
WHERE typeDecl.name IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN p.name as propertyName, typeDecl.name as typeName, p.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier)
WHERE id.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN p.name as propertyName, id.text as signalType, p.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.id, c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(c:ClassDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.name as className, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(c:ClassDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
OPTIONAL MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, sigId.text as signalType, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TYPE_DECLARATION|HAS_DESCENDANT*1..3]->(sigId:Identifier)
WHERE sigId.text IN ['Signal', 'WritableSignal', 'InputSignal', 'ModelSignal']
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, sigId.text as signalType, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN DISTINCT c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier { text: 'signal' })
RETURN c.name as className, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
LIMIT 50

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier { text: 'signal' })
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier { text: 'signal' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
WHERE p.name IN ['disabled', 'state']
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration)
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(id:Identifier { text: 'signal' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(tb:Identifier)
MATCH (tb)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath

MATCH (c:ClassDeclaration)-[:HAS_DECORATOR]->(cd:Decorator)
MATCH (cd)-[:HAS_DESCENDANT]->(cdi:Identifier { text: 'Component' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_MEMBER]->(p:PropertyDeclaration { name: 'state' })
MATCH (c)-[:HAS_TEMPLATE_BINDING]->(:Identifier)-[:HAS_ANCESTOR]->(p)
RETURN c.name as componentName, p.name as propertyName, c.filePath
